    G

    getCoffeeTypes() - Method in class Cafe
    Returneaza numarul de tipuri de cafele vandute.
    getEnd() - Method in class Road
    Returneaza locatia destinatie
    getLocationList() - Method in class Problem
    Returneaza lista de locatii curenta.
    getLocationName() - Method in class Location
    Returneaza numele locatiei.
    getPopulation() - Method in class City
    Returneaza populatia orasului.
    getRestaurantCapacity() - Method in class Restaurant
    Returneaza capacitatea restaurantului.
    getRoadLenght() - Method in class Road
    Returneaza lungimea drumului
    getRoadList() - Method in class Problem
    Returneaza lista de drumuri curenta
    getRoadType() - Method in class Road
    Returneaza tipul drumului.
    getSpeedLimit() - Method in class Road
    Returneaza limita de viteza a drumului.
    getStart() - Method in class Road
    Returneaza locatia de start

    Returneaza numarul de terminale.

    Returneaza coordonata X.

    Returneaza coordonata Y.
